---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, adapter, or enhancement for FlutterSync.
title: "[feature] <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve. What use case is currently unsupported, awkward, or fragile? Who benefits from solving it?

## Proposed solution

Describe the API surface, behavior, or component you would like to see. Include:

- The public symbols you expect to call.
- The semantics under normal, offline, and conflict scenarios.
- The interaction with HLC, the outbox, conflict resolvers, and the scheduler.
- Any platform-specific behavior.

If you can, include a short Dart snippet showing how the feature would be used.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds exist today? Why are they insufficient?

## Out of scope

What this request explicitly does not cover, to keep the surface area focused.

## Additional context

Links to relevant papers, RFCs, prior art in other ecosystems (for example, PowerSync, ElectricSQL, Replicache, Yjs, Automerge), and any constraints from your environment.
